title: Games Arcade
strap: Bite-sized challenges, infinite fun — built one game at a time.

games.title: Hold the Mark
games.desc: NEW · Built mobile-first for phones and tablets. Defend the Made by Matt mark with brand-shape towers, Harmony combos and a calm-play Focus meter. Five levels, daily challenges, unlockable tower skins and Mark themes — works offline in any orientation.

games.title: Trail Runner
games.desc: A fast-paced reflex runner navigating procedural terrain hazards. Ideal for a quick motor-skills reset.

games.title: VoxelCraft
games.desc: A localized 3D sandbox block builder exploring spatial coordinates, geometry, and structural placement.

games.title: Vortex
games.desc: A high-intensity tunnel-dodging experience testing rapid peripheral processing and predictive tracking accuracy.

games.title: Globe Snake
games.desc: A unique 3D spherical twist on classic mechanics, mapping directional inputs onto non-Euclidean global surfaces.

games.title: Neon Snake Overdrive
games.desc: An optimized, high-performance vector snake arena calibrated for fluid mobile and desktop response pathways.

games.title: Neon Siege
games.desc: A localized matrix defense challenge requiring calculated tactical placement and rapid prioritization under pressure.

games.title: Neon Garden
games.desc: An ambient, low-arousal pattern-generation loop designed for focus conditioning and cognitive pacing.

games.title: Orbital
games.desc: A physics-based gravitational simulation mapping kinetic momentum, planetary vectors, and circular mechanics.

games.title: Grid Chase
games.desc: A high-speed coordinate grid maze testing rapid directional corrections and immediate geometric mapping layout transitions.

games.title: Prism
games.desc: A perspective-shifting puzzle manipulating light angles, alignment paths, and spatial refraction lines.

games.title: Grapple
games.desc: A momentum-centric physics playground focusing on vector hook connections and conservation of kinetic energy.

games.title: Marble
games.desc: A tilt-and-gravity simulator testing meticulous physical adjustment, balancing thresholds, and micro-coordination.

games.title: Slipstream
games.desc: A streamlined rhythmic velocity test tracking uninterrupted forward momentum and rapid gap synchronization.

games.title: Slipstream - GP
games.desc: An advanced grand-prix variant of the velocity engine introducing complex velocity paths and tracking scales.

games.title: Wrecking Crew
games.desc: A destructive physics environment evaluating structural integrity, mass distributions, and center-of-gravity impacts.

games.title: Lumins
games.desc: A Lemmings-style rescue puzzle: assign roles to your Lumins to dig, build and bridge them safely to the exit — complete with a full level editor.

games.title: Static
games.desc: The newest addition to the arcade — a fresh reflex-and-focus challenge for quick brain-break sessions.

games.title: One Guy
games.desc: A solo ghost-runner: each attempt races the recorded 'ghost' of the last run on this device, so pupils compete against their own past best rather than each other. Shareable ghost codes let a run be passed on.

games.title: The Last Lighthouse
games.desc: A keeper survival game: hold the last lighthouse watch by watch, guiding vessels safely through storms and Tempest conditions. Earn Keeper Marks, build your Keeper Record, and explore the new archipelago map — now updated to v1.1 with portable backup codes so progress can move between devices.

games.title: Kids vs Staff: Showdown
games.desc: Whole-class team quiz: pupils take on the staff across scored rounds. Class-vs-teacher framing — no individual leaderboard.

games.title: World Cup: Road to the Three Lions Final
games.desc: Teacher-driven end-of-term tournament: three nations, possession and steals, stadium codes, a VAR twist and a cooperative England final. Auto-tallied scoring and evidence print included.

games.title: World Cup v3 — Match Director
games.desc: Run a match as director — Made by Matt arcade.

games.title: World Cup v5 — Showdown
games.desc: Head-to-head showdown — Made by Matt arcade.

games.title: Trekkers Trail Runner — Tees Coast
games.desc: Tees Coast edition of Trail Runner.
